title: Fiscal Years
description: The periods of time that an institution uses for accounting and financial statement purposes.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the fiscal year.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the fiscal year.

reportingSegment.title: Reporting Segment
reportingSegment.description: The segment of the educational institution used for reporting purposes.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The start date of the fiscal year.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The end date of the fiscal year.

numberOfPeriods.title: Number Of Periods
numberOfPeriods.description: The number of periods in the fiscal year.

yearEndAdjustment.title: Year End Adjustment
yearEndAdjustment.description: An indication whether the year end adjustment is active or inactive.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the fiscal year.
